captions.instagram:
Charleston, South Carolina tide predictions for the week ahead.

The highest astronomical tide in this seven-day window is predicted at 5.56 ft above local MLLW at 12:21 AM on July 19, 2026. The lowest is -0.10 ft, a predicted range of 5.66 ft at NOAA station 8665530.

Times are station-local. Predictions are not observations or a flood forecast.

Open the full station chart at the link in bio.

Save this chart for coastal planning around Charleston. Which South Carolina coast station should Perigee cover next?

NOAA CO-OPS • Planning aid — not for navigation or a substitute for official advisories, local procedures, or operator judgment.
